items.explanation: Future decisions and promises use will + base verb: will call.
Predictions about the future use will + base verb: will rain.

items.prompt: They don't come to the party.
answer: They will not come to the party.
They won't come to the party.
items.explanation: Negative future: will not / won't + base verb.

answer: She will be twenty next year.
items.explanation: 'be' keeps its base form after will: will be.
Offers and future actions use will + base verb: will help.
